prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.4 kg; Height 167.7 cm; BMI 19.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 6.6%; 3 months ago 6.6%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 145mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 52.9kg; 9 months ago 49.7kg; 6 months ago 53.7kg; 3 months ago 50.1kg; current 53.4kg), Height (12 months ago 167.7cm; 9 months ago 167.7cm; 6 months ago 167.7cm; 3 months ago 167.7cm; current 167.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 144mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 146mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 81mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 83mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 34U/L; 3 months ago 34U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 176mg/g; 9 months ago 123mg/g; 6 months ago 151mg/g; 3 months ago 141mg/g; current 118mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 52mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 139mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 9.4g/dL; 6 months ago 9.4g/dL; 3 months ago 9.4g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.74 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
